title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 3333 Walnut Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: -Varies by program -Teen Center hours: Monday-Thursday 2:45pm-6:30pm, Friday 12:15pm-6:30pm -Summer extended hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (541) 267-3635 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 267-3635 Main phone Main phone (541) 267-3635 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $15 annual membership fee. Other additional fees vary by program. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-6:30pm Services: Arts and Crafts Instruction Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Literacy Programs Team Sports/Leagues Volunteer Opportunities Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
